entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS

entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns, including risks and impacts

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: Emissions that contribute to the greenhouse effect and climate change

entities.name: SYNERGIES
entities.description: Simultaneous benefits arising from food system interventions and policies

entities.name: TRADE-OFFS
entities.description: Conflicting outcomes where one benefit comes at the expense of another

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An approach to managing landscapes to sustainably increase productivity and resilience

entities.name: SYSTEM DYNAMICS
entities.description: A methodology to understand the nonlinear behavior of complex systems over time

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The process of shifting food systems toward sustainability

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART VILLAGE
entities.description: A community-based approach to implementing climate-smart agriculture

entities.name: NORTHERN GHANA
entities.description: The geographical region where the study is conducted

entities.name: POPULATION GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in the human population requiring more food provision

entities.name: EXTREME EVENTS
entities.description: Frequent and extreme weather events impacting food systems
